name: Tree House Education & Accessories Limited
summary: Tree House Education & Accessories Limited, an educational services provider, operates pre-schools in India. The company offers a range of programs for children, including play group, nursery, junior kindergarten (KG), senior KG, day care services, teacher training courses, summer camps, and hobby classes. It also franchises its schools, as well as leases education infrastructure to K12 schools. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Mumbai, India.
